info.title: pathfinder
info.description: CLI used to find all API routes present in a .NET core/framework assembly.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze DLLs for routing information and output JSON or text

options.name: --dll-dir
options.description: Root directory to search for DLLs [default: .]

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to config file. Should be able to find it automatically. [default: pathfinder.json]

arguments.name: DLLGLOBS
arguments.description: Glob patterns for DLLs to analyze (e.g. *.dll or **/*.dll)

commands.name: report
commands.description: Analyze and also produce a report

options.name: --dll-dir
options.description: Root directory to search for DLLs [default: .]

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to config file. Should be able to find it automatically. [default: pathfinder.json]

options.name: --kind
options.description: Kind of report to generate. Does not generate reports if not provided [default: 1]

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: Directory to output the generated report. [default: ./report]

options.name: --templates-dir
options.description: Directory containing additional templates for the generated report [default: ./templates]

arguments.name: DLLGLOBS
arguments.description: Glob patterns for DLLs to analyze (e.g. *.dll or **/*.dll)
